get.description: Health and dataset status endpoint for the ECS Time API.
Operational health endpoint for the ECS time engine.

post.description: Compute compact ECS scientific time state from a canonical UTC timestamp. The TAI−UTC value is resolved from the reconciled leap-second dataset.

get.description: Return the reconciled TAI−UTC offset for a UTC timestamp.

parameters.name: timestamp

schema.description: UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 Z format.
schema.title: Timestamp

parameters.description: UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 Z format.

post.description: Return the full ECS scientific time state. This separates reconciled dataset-backed values from mathematically computed and derived time values.

get.description: Return a consolidated public report for the ECS unified leap-second time authority, including pre-1972 formula coverage, post-1972 leap steps, Bulletin C announcement context, validation, and current offset.
Return public-safe availability and summary metadata for the ECS unified pre-1972 formula, post-1972 leap-second, and Bulletin C announcement-aware dataset.
Return a compact timestamp-specific leap-second validation result, including the active reconciled segment and resolved TAI-UTC value.

parameters.name: timestamp

schema.description: UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 Z format.
schema.title: Timestamp

parameters.description: UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 Z format.

tai_minus_utc.description: Resolved TAI minus UTC value in seconds.

segment_type.description: Segment type, for example formula or step.

source.description: Source family or reconciled segment source.

tai_minus_utc.description: Latest TAI minus UTC value in seconds.

dataset_version.description: Content-derived dataset version hash for the reconciled scientific artifact.

canonical_schema.description: Canonical schema identifier for the reconciled dataset artifact.

source_policy.description: Policy used to reconcile upstream source authorities.

reconciliation_scope.title: Reconciliation Scope
reconciliation_scope.description: Declared scope of the unified reconciled dataset.

LeapSecondReportDatasetResponse.description: Dataset metadata for the unified leap-second report.

LeapSecondReportLinksResponse.title: LeapSecondReportLinksResponse
LeapSecondReportLinksResponse.description: Public API links related to the leap-second report.

source_authorities.title: Source Authorities
source_authorities.description: Authoritative upstream sources reconciled into the ECS time dataset.

LeapSecondReportResponse.title: LeapSecondReportResponse
LeapSecondReportResponse.description:
Unified public leap-second report.

This consolidates dataset status, source authorities, reconciliation scope,
validation summary, coverage, and current offset into one commercial-grade
API response.

pre_1972_tai_utc_formula_era.title: Pre 1972 Tai Utc Formula Era
pre_1972_tai_utc_formula_era.description: Whether pre-1972 formula-era segments are included.

post_1972_leap_second_step_era.title: Post 1972 Leap Second Step Era
post_1972_leap_second_step_era.description: Whether post-1972 leap-second step segments are included.

bulletin_c_announcement_context.title: Bulletin C Announcement Context
bulletin_c_announcement_context.description: Whether Bulletin C announcement/no-announcement context is represented.

announced_future_events_supported.title: Announced Future Events Supported
announced_future_events_supported.description: Whether announced future leap-second metadata is supported.

unified_pre_leap_leap_post_leap_contract.title: Unified Pre Leap Leap Post Leap Contract
unified_pre_leap_leap_post_leap_contract.description: Whether the dataset is exposed as a unified runtime contract.

LeapSecondReportScopeResponse.title: LeapSecondReportScopeResponse
LeapSecondReportScopeResponse.description: Reconciliation scope covered by the ECS unified TAI-UTC dataset.

valid.title: Valid
valid.description: Whether the reconciled dataset passed validation.

validation_level.title: Validation Level
validation_level.description: Validation scope represented by this report.

source_authority_reconciliation.title: Source Authority Reconciliation
source_authority_reconciliation.description: Whether recognised source authorities were reconciled into the dataset.

authority_consistency_check.title: Authority Consistency Check
authority_consistency_check.description: Whether consistency checks were performed across reconciled source authorities.

scientific_rules.title: Scientific Rules
scientific_rules.description: Detailed scientific validation rules and evidence for the reconciled leap-second authority dataset.

LeapSecondReportValidationResponse.title: LeapSecondReportValidationResponse
LeapSecondReportValidationResponse.description: Validation summary for the unified leap-second report.

dataset.description: Name of the reconciled leap-second dataset.

generated_at.description: Timestamp when the reconciled dataset was generated.

reconciled_report_exists.title: Reconciled Report Exists
reconciled_report_exists.description: Whether the reconciled report is available.

announced_event_count.description: Number of announced future leap-second events.

source_authorities.title: Source Authorities
source_authorities.description: Authoritative upstream sources reconciled into the ECS time dataset.

LeapSecondStatusResponse.description:
Public-safe leap-second dataset status response.

This avoids exposing local filesystem paths while preserving operational
and scientific traceability.

tai_minus_utc.title: Tai Minus Utc
tai_minus_utc.description: Resolved TAI minus UTC value in seconds.

covered_by_dataset.title: Covered By Dataset
covered_by_dataset.description: Whether the timestamp is covered by an active dataset segment.

is_future.title: Is Future
is_future.description: Whether the timestamp is after the current UTC time.

uses_announced_event.title: Uses Announced Event
uses_announced_event.description: Whether the timestamp resolution depends on an announced future event.

LeapSecondTimestampCoverageResponse.description: Dataset coverage information for a specific timestamp.

public_report.description: Endpoint exposing the public leap-second report.

reconciled_dataset.description: Endpoint exposing the reconciled leap-second dataset.

LeapSecondTraceabilityResponse.description: Public-safe traceability links for leap-second evidence endpoints.

dataset.description: Name of the reconciled leap-second dataset.

valid.description: Whether the timestamp could be resolved against the dataset.

traceability_endpoint.description: Endpoint exposing fuller technical query details.

tai_minus_utc.title: Tai Minus Utc
tai_minus_utc.description: TAI minus UTC offset, reconciled from the ECS time dataset.

TimeComputeResponse.title: TimeComputeResponse
TimeComputeResponse.description:
Compact computed time-state response.

This is used by /time/compute.

t_tt_centuries.title: T Tt Centuries
t_tt_centuries.description: Julian centuries of TT from J2000.0.

seconds_since_j2000.title: Seconds Since J2000
seconds_since_j2000.description: Seconds elapsed since the J2000.0 epoch.

TimeDerivedResponse.title: TimeDerivedResponse
TimeDerivedResponse.description: Secondary scientific values derived mathematically from the computed time state.

input.title: Input
input.description: Original timestamp supplied by the user.

TimeFullStateResponse.title: TimeFullStateResponse
TimeFullStateResponse.description:
Full ECS scientific time-state response.

This response is designed for scientific consumers that need:
- source: public-safe dataset/method provenance
- scales: computed time-scale datetimes
- julian: Julian Date outputs
- offsets: resolved/fixed time-scale offsets
- derived: secondary calculated values

TimeJulianResponse.title: TimeJulianResponse
TimeJulianResponse.description: Julian Date values calculated from the computed time state.

tai_minus_utc.title: Tai Minus Utc
tai_minus_utc.description: TAI minus UTC offset at the requested timestamp.

TimeOffsetResponse.title: TimeOffsetResponse
TimeOffsetResponse.description:
TAI−UTC offset-only response.

This is used by /time/offset.

tai_minus_utc.title: Tai Minus Utc
tai_minus_utc.description: TAI minus UTC offset resolved from reconciled leap-second data.

tt_minus_tai.title: Tt Minus Tai
tt_minus_tai.description: Constant TT minus TAI offset in seconds.

gps_minus_tai.title: Gps Minus Tai
gps_minus_tai.description: Constant GPS minus TAI offset in seconds.

TimeOffsetsResponse.title: TimeOffsetsResponse
TimeOffsetsResponse.description: Time-scale offsets used by the full scientific time-state response.

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: UTC timestamp in ISO 8601 format using canonical Z notation.

TimeRequest.title: TimeRequest
TimeRequest.description: Request body for timestamp-based ECS time calculations.

tdb.title: Tdb
tdb.description: TDB datetime computed from TT using the ECS standard low-order periodic TDB-TT correction, suitable for VSOP87-style ephemeris support.

dataset.title: Dataset
dataset.description: Name of the authoritative/reconciled dataset used by the time engine.

data_product.title: Data Product
data_product.description: ECS data product label for the reconciled time dataset.

method.title: Method
method.description: Computation method used to produce the scientific time state.

source_authorities.title: Source Authorities
source_authorities.description: Authoritative upstream sources reconciled into the ECS time dataset.

generated_at.title: Generated At
generated_at.description: Timestamp when the reconciled dataset artifact was generated.

dataset_id.title: Dataset Id
dataset_id.description: Stable public ECS dataset identifier for the reconciled leap-second authority dataset.

dataset_version.title: Dataset Version
dataset_version.description: Content-derived version hash for the reconciled scientific dataset.

content_hash.title: Content Hash
content_hash.description: Deterministic content hash of the reconciled dataset content.

canonical_schema.title: Canonical Schema
canonical_schema.description: Canonical schema identifier for the reconciled dataset artifact.

source_policy.title: Source Policy
source_policy.description: Policy used to reconcile upstream time authorities.

traceability_endpoint.title: Traceability Endpoint
traceability_endpoint.description: Endpoint where the public leap-second authority report can be inspected.

TimeSourceResponse.title: TimeSourceResponse
TimeSourceResponse.description:
Public-safe source metadata for the full ECS time-state response.

This exposes scientific provenance without leaking local filesystem paths.
